title: Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon (2015) is a acclaimed roguelike title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Descend procedural floors, manage risk, and rebuild after permadeath.
